name: §6Slug
description:
§8Farming Pet

§7Defense: §a+20
§7Intelligence: §b25

§6Slow and Steady
§7When fishing in the §cCrimson Isle§7,
§aSlugfish §7take §a50% §7less time to catch.

§6Pest Friends
§7Grants §2+40ൠ Bonus Pest Chance§7.

§6Repugnant Aroma
§7When farming in a plot affected by a
§aSprayonator§7, gain §6+100☘ Farming
§6Fortune§7.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§6§lLEGENDARY

variants.name: Azure Sea Slug Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to §aSlug
§7pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
